title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 27 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 27 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 27 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 27/06/2022
DCE iron ore was was shocked and continued upward all the day.The main contract closed at 736,increased of 0.96%. Traders are not veryenthusiastic about shipments, steel mills are mainly on the sidelines, and there are few transactions in the market.PBF at Shandong port dealt 830 yuan/mt,increase 25 yuan/mt compare with yesterday. PBF at Tangshan port dealt 835 yuan/mt,increase 35 yuan/mt.
